Home.subtitle: Linux, open source, privacy, internet freedom, and technology.
Home.expertiseDesc: In the technology world, I love building architectures that prioritize simplicity, performance, and security. My priority is designing products that not only work but feel elegant.
Home.expertise1Desc: OS-level optimizations, server management, and infrastructure security.
Home.expertise2Desc: Community-driven projects, transparent development processes, and free software philosophy.
Home.expertise3Desc: Internet freedom, data privacy, and secure-by-design architectures.
Home.expertise4Desc: High-performance interfaces with React, Next.js, MDX, and modern state management tools.
Home.ctaDesc: I love discussing new ideas, receiving feedback, and meeting new people in the open source world. Feel free to reach out.

About.title: About
About.subtitle: The endeavor to understand the system, code, and architecture.
About.whoAmIDesc: I am a Linux enthusiast, open source supporter, and technology geek. I love building systems that prioritize simplicity, performance, and security in the digital world. My goal is not just to write working code, but to design products that are easy to maintain in the long run, elegant, and give a "premium" feel.
About.philosophyDesc: Avoiding unnecessary complexity. The beauty of a system lies not in the abundance of its features, but in how harmoniously its parts work together. Avoiding overengineering and creating "silent" designs that exactly meet the needs is my core principle.
About.currentWorkTitle: What Am I Working On Now?
About.currentWorkDesc: Currently, I am perfecting my personal digital workspace (this site). At the same time, I am producing projects and turning my ideas into reality to make structural contributions to the open source ecosystem.
